headline: How is AvalonBay (AVB) Navigating Through Deflated Multifamily Occupancies
summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. (NYSE:AVB) is one of the 10 cheap REITs with huge upside. On March 4, Scotiabank reduced the firm’s price target on AvalonBay Communities Inc. (NYSE:AVB) from $193 to $190. The firm maintained its Sector Perform rating on the shares, which now offer a revised upside potential of over 12%. The update comes […]
